title: Papilionanthe hookeriana
taxonomy: Papilionanthe hookeriana is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Epidendroideae. The genus Papilionanthe is part of tribe Vandeae. The classification of Papilionanthe hookeriana is further refined through molecular phylogenetic studies.
